anchor: If Alice studies hard, then she passes the exam.
amr_positive:
# ::snt If Alice studies hard, then she passes the exam.
(or / or
    :op1 (s / study-01
            :polarity -
            :ARG0 p2
            :ARG1-of (h / hard-02))
    :op2 (p / pass-07
            :ARG1 (p2 / person
                      :name (n / name
                               :op1 "Alice"))
            :ARG2 (e / exam)))
positive: No hard study, or Alice passed the exam.

anchor: If Mary owns a car, then she has a driver's license.
amr_positive:
# ::snt If Mary owns a car, then she has a driver's license.
(h / have-condition-91
   :ARG1 (l / license-01
            :ARG1 (d / drive-01
                     :ARG0 (p / person
                              :name (n / name
                                       :op1 "Mary")))
            :ARG2 p)
   :ARG2 (o / own-01
            :ARG0 p
            :ARG1 (c / car))
   :polarity -)
positive: Mary does not have a driver's license if she owns a car.

anchor: If the building has an elevator, residents on upper floors are not required to take the stairs.
amr_positive:
# ::snt If the building has an elevator, residents on upper floors are not required to take the stairs.
(h / have-03
   :ARG0 (b / building)
   :ARG1 (e / elevator)
   :condition (r / require-01
                 :ARG1 (t / take-01
                          :ARG0 (p / person
                                   :ARG0-of (r2 / reside-01
                                                :ARG1 (f / floor
                                                         :mod (u / upper))))
                          :ARG1 (s / stair))
                 :ARG2 p)
   :polarity -)
positive: If the upper floor residents were required to take stairs, the building would not have an elevator.

anchor: The conference cannot be held without proper accreditation.
amr_positive:
# ::snt The conference cannot be held without proper accreditation.
(p / possible-01
   :ARG1 (h / hold-04
            :ARG1 (c / conference)
            :manner (a / accreditation
                       :polarity -
                       :mod (p2 / proper))))
positive: The conference could have been held without proper accreditation.
